description: LLM-powered behavioral analysis command for pattern detection across week/month of activity data

userStories.title: Insights data aggregation: per-day and per-repo stats
userStories.description: Add `aggregate_insights_data(conn, from, to, session_gap_minutes, first_commit_minutes) -> InsightsData` in query.rs. Computes: commits per day-of-week, commits per hour-of-day, avg commit message length per day-of-week, bug-fix commit ratio (messages matching fix/bug/hotfix patterns), PR merge times if enrichment available, per-repo commit counts. Returns a structured InsightsData value — not raw JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: InsightsData struct with fields: period_label, total_commits, total_repos, commits_by_dow: [u32;7], commits_by_hour: [u32;24], avg_msg_len_by_dow: [f64;7], bugfix_commits: u32, total_commits_with_msg: u32, pr_merge_times_hours: Vec<f64>, per_repo: Vec<RepoInsights>
RepoInsights: repo_name, commits, estimated_minutes, branches_touched, has_prs, avg_commit_msg_len
Bug-fix classification: message.to_lowercase() contains any of: 'fix', 'bug', 'hotfix', 'patch', 'revert'
commits_by_dow and commits_by_hour use local time (same pattern as existing rhythm queries)
avg_msg_len_by_dow: 0.0 for days with no commits
pr_merge_times_hours: only include PRs with both created_at and merged_at from enrichment (skip if unavailable)
Empty range returns zero-valued struct with empty vecs

userStories.title: Insights prompt construction
userStories.description: Add `build_insights_prompt(data: &InsightsData, window_label: &str) -> String` in llm.rs. Serializes InsightsData to a condensed, token-efficient text representation (not raw JSON) for the LLM prompt. Designed to fit within ~4000 tokens even for a full month of data.
acceptanceCriteria: Output is plain text summary of the data, NOT raw JSON

Includes: period, total commits, commit distribution by day of week (top 3 days highlighted), commit distribution by hour (peak hour), bug-fix ratio as percentage, avg commit message length trend (shorter/longer toward end of week), per-repo breakdown (repo name, commits, estimated hours)
Token budget: aim for <2000 tokens input. If per_repo > 10 repos, truncate to top 10 by commit count with a note
Does NOT include full event lists or commit hashes — only aggregated stats
Includes a brief framing line: 'Analyze these developer activity patterns and provide specific, data-driven behavioral insights:'

userStories.title: Insights system prompt constant
userStories.description: Add `INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT: &str` constant in llm.rs. Distinct from SYSTEM_PROMPT (which is for the existing --summarize flag). The insights prompt instructs the LLM to produce behavioral pattern insights with specific quantitative claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Constant named INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT in llm.rs

Instructs LLM to: produce 4-6 specific insights, each starting with a quantitative claim ('Your PRs that merged fastest...', 'Tuesdays account for X% of your commits...'), avoid generic advice, focus on patterns visible in the data
Instructs LLM to: use bullet points, be concise (1-2 sentences per insight), cite specific numbers from the data
Instructs LLM to: avoid filler phrases like 'Great job!' or 'Consider...' — report patterns only

userStories.title: LLM insights API call function
userStories.description: Add `generate_insights(config: &LlmConfig, prompt: &str) -> anyhow::Result<()>` in llm.rs. Streams insights to stdout. Reuses the existing SSE streaming infrastructure (stream_anthropic / stream_openai patterns). Uses INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT, max_tokens=1024.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Anthropic or OpenAI based on config.provider (same routing as summarize_activity)
Uses INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT as the system prompt
max_tokens: 1024
Streams output to stdout via parse_sse_stream (no buffering — stream as it arrives)
On API error: bail! with provider name and HTTP status
On rate limit (HTTP 429): bail! with message 'Rate limited by <provider>. Try again in a moment.'
Timeout: 60s (longer than summarize_activity's 30s — insights require more reasoning)

userStories.title: CLI command: blackbox insights
userStories.description: Add `Insights` variant to Commands enum in cli.rs. Add match arm in main.rs. Accepts `--window week|month` (default week) and `--format pretty|json` flags. `--format json` emits the raw InsightsData as JSON (no LLM call). `--format pretty` (default) calls the LLM and streams insights.
acceptanceCriteria: blackbox insights runs without error (requires LLM config)
blackbox insights --window week uses this-week date range (week_range())
blackbox insights --window month uses this-month date range (month_range())
blackbox insights --format json exits 0, emits valid JSON of InsightsData (no LLM call)
blackbox insights --format pretty calls LLM and streams to stdout
Missing API key: print actionable error from build_llm_config
Not exempt from config check (requires DB)

userStories.title: InsightsData JSON serialization
userStories.description: Make InsightsData and RepoInsights serializable. Add `render_insights_json(data: &InsightsData) -> String` in output.rs. Used by --format json path.
acceptanceCriteria: InsightsData and RepoInsights both derive serde::Serialize
render_insights_json returns serde_json::to_string_pretty output
JSON keys: snake_case matching struct field names
commits_by_dow serialized as array of 7 u32s
commits_by_hour serialized as array of 24 u32s
pr_merge_times_hours serialized as array of f64s

userStories.title: Config: insights-specific LLM settings
userStories.description: Add optional insights-specific config fields to Config in config.rs: `insights_max_tokens`, `insights_window`. These override defaults when present. Document in the error message from build_llm_config.
acceptanceCriteria: Config gains: `insights_max_tokens: Option<u32>` (default None → 1024), `insights_window: Option<String>` (default None → 'week')
Both fields have `#[serde(default)]`
insights_max_tokens used in generate_insights if Some, otherwise 1024
insights_window used as default --window value if not overridden by CLI arg
No breaking change to existing config files (all new fields are optional)

userStories.title: Token budget enforcement: chunking large datasets
userStories.description: In build_insights_prompt, enforce token budget. If per_repo > 10, truncate to top 10 by commit count. If commits_by_hour all non-zero and dense, summarize as 'peak: HH:00-HH:00, secondary: ...' instead of full 24-slot listing. Add `fn truncate_repos_for_prompt(repos: &[RepoInsights], max: usize) -> (Vec<&RepoInsights>, bool)` returning truncated slice and whether truncation occurred.
acceptanceCriteria: repos > 10: prompt includes only top 10 by commits, with note '(showing top 10 of N repos)'
commits_by_hour: instead of 24 numbers, show 'Peak hour: 10:00 (N commits), top 3 hours: 10, 14, 15'
commits_by_dow: show as labeled percentages, e.g. 'Mon: 18%, Tue: 22%, ...'
Final prompt length measured in chars; if > 8000 chars, trim per_repo entries further
truncate_repos_for_prompt is a private fn in llm.rs

userStories.title: Empty activity handling
userStories.description: Handle the case where InsightsData has total_commits == 0 (no activity in the requested window). Short-circuit before any LLM call and print an informative message.
acceptanceCriteria: If total_commits == 0 and total_repos == 0: print 'No activity recorded for <window>. Nothing to analyze.' and exit 0
No LLM API call is made for empty data
--format json with empty data still emits valid JSON (zero-value struct)

userStories.title: Progress indicator while waiting for LLM
userStories.description: Print 'Analyzing <N> commits across <M> repos...' to stderr before streaming begins, so the user knows the command is working during the API latency. Use eprintln! (not stdout) so it doesn't pollute piped output.
acceptanceCriteria: Printed to stderr before the first API call
Format: 'Analyzing N commits across M repos...' where N and M come from InsightsData
Printed even when the API call ultimately fails (print before the call, not after)
Nothing extra printed after — the LLM stream output follows naturally on stdout

userStories.title: PR merge time enrichment in insights
userStories.description: In aggregate_insights_data, attempt to populate pr_merge_times_hours from PrInfo if enrichment data is available. PrInfo comes from enrichment::enrich_with_prs. Only include PRs with state=='MERGED' and both created_at and merged_at present.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls enrichment::enrich_with_prs on the repos vec before aggregating
For each merged PR: compute (merged_at - created_at).num_hours() as f64 and push to pr_merge_times_hours
If gh CLI unavailable (enrichment returns empty): pr_merge_times_hours is empty vec — no error
If no merged PRs in window: empty vec
Insight prompt includes PR merge time stats only if pr_merge_times_hours is non-empty

userStories.title: Prompt includes commit message length trend
userStories.description: In build_insights_prompt, compute and include the commit message length trend across the week. If avg_msg_len_by_dow shows a downward trend toward end of week (Fri < Mon by >10 chars), note 'Messages got shorter toward end of week'. Include the actual per-day averages.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt section: 'Avg commit msg length by day: Mon: Xch, Tue: Ych, ...'
If Mon avg > Fri avg + 10 chars: append '(trend: shorter toward end of week)'
If Fri avg > Mon avg + 10 chars: append '(trend: longer toward end of week)'
If < 2 days have commits: omit this section from the prompt
Lengths measured in characters of the commit message string

userStories.title: Unit test: aggregate_insights_data
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs, insert commits at known timestamps and assert InsightsData fields. Test bug-fix classification, DOW bucketing, and empty range.
acceptanceCriteria: Insert 3 commits with messages 'fix: login bug', 'feat: add button', 'bug: crash' — assert bugfix_commits==2
Insert commits on known UTC timestamps (Mon=0, Wed=2, etc.) — assert commits_by_dow matches
Empty DB: total_commits==0, commits_by_dow all zeros, pr_merge_times_hours empty
Insert commit with message length 20 on Mon and 8 on Fri — assert avg_msg_len_by_dow[0] ~= 20 and avg_msg_len_by_dow[4] ~= 8

userStories.title: Unit test: build_insights_prompt
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs, construct an InsightsData with known values and assert the prompt contains expected substrings. Test token budget truncation with >10 repos.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt contains 'Analyze these developer activity patterns'
Prompt contains the period label
With 15 repos: prompt contains 'showing top 10 of 15 repos'
Prompt does not contain raw commit hashes or full event lists
Prompt length < 8000 chars for 15-repo dataset

userStories.title: Unit test: INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT content
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs, assert INSIGHTS_SYSTEM_PROMPT meets required properties.
acceptanceCriteria: Contains 'quantitative' or 'specific' (instructs numeric claims)
Does not contain 'Great job' or 'Consider' (no filler language)
Length > 100 chars (is a real prompt, not placeholder)

userStories.title: Integration test: CLI command blackbox insights --format json
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs or tests/cli_test.rs, use assert_cmd to verify `blackbox insights --format json` exits 0 and emits valid JSON (does not require LLM API key since no LLM call is made).
acceptanceCriteria: blackbox insights --format json exits 0 with populated DB
stdout is valid JSON parseable as InsightsData shape
JSON contains 'total_commits' field
Does not require llm_api_key in config (--format json skips LLM)

userStories.title: Integration test: empty activity short-circuit
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs, verify that with an empty DB, `blackbox insights` (pretty mode, no API key) exits 0 and prints the 'No activity' message without attempting an API call.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty DB + no API key configured: exit 0, stdout contains 'No activity'
Not an API key error — short-circuits before LLM check

userStories.title: Integration test: missing API key error path
userStories.description: In tests/insights_test.rs, verify that with a populated DB and no llm_api_key in config, `blackbox insights` (default pretty mode) exits non-zero with a helpful error message.
acceptanceCriteria: Populated DB + no llm_api_key: exit non-zero
stderr or stdout contains 'llm_api_key' (from build_llm_config error message)
Error message includes example config snippet

userStories.title: Update README.md and AGENTS.md
userStories.description: Update project documentation to reflect new feature. README.md: add new command to Commands table if applicable, update feature descriptions. AGENTS.md: add new source files to Architecture tree, update Key Patterns if new patterns introduced.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md Commands table includes new command (if a CLI command was added)
README.md describes the new feature/capability
AGENTS.md Architecture src/ tree lists any new .rs files
AGENTS.md Key Dependencies updated if new crates added
userStories.notes: This must be the LAST story executed. Reference README.md and AGENTS.md in project root.
